title: Bow Wow 24" Stuffing-Free Long Plush Dog Toy – Crinkle Body & Squeaker Head – Interactive Tug & Fetch Animal Toy – Colors May Vary (Farm, Safari, Unicorn, Zebra)
features: Stuffing-Free Design: Built for mess-free play—no fluff to rip, just soft, durable fun dogs can tug, shake, and chew.
Squeaky & Crinkly Combo: Features a squeaker in the head and crinkle in the body for extra sound stimulation and excitement.
Extra-Long Shape: At 24 inches, these plush toys are ideal for interactive games like tug-of-war or solo play.
Whimsical Animal Themes: Choose from Farm, Safari, Zebra, and Unicorn characters — each toy is full of personality and play value.
Assorted Colors: Each toy is shipped in assorted colors for added surprise and fun. Colors may vary.
description: Product Description Keep your pup entertained with the Bow Wow Stuffing-Free Long Plush Dog Toy, a 24-inch crinkle and squeak toy that brings interactive fun without the mess. Each toy features a squeaky head and a crinkle-filled body for irresistible sound and texture that dogs love. With no internal stuffing, there’s less cleanup and more durable play. Available in imaginative animal styles—Farm, Safari, Unicorn, and Zebra—this toy is perfect for shaking, thrashing, and tugging. Designed for everyday indoor use, it’s a safe and playful choice for small to medium dogs who love a little noise and a lot of fun. Directions Included in the packaging
